article_sentence: No matter which air conditioner you choose, to get the best output and performance from the air conditioner, it is recommended to maintain it regularly throughout the year by performing a few simple actions - the air filters should be cleaned regularly; in the summer days, the temperature should be set to 20-24 degrees Celsius (yes, even on the hottest days) and the air vents should be directed parallel to the floor or slightly upward; if the outdoor unit is installed on the ground, make sure its surroundings are clean, so that no weeds, plastic bags, or any other dirt is sucked into it; and most importantly, you should keep your fingers crossed that the air conditioner will survive its many hours of operation and withstand the heat load and effort
summary_sentence: To ensure the air conditioner's efficiency over time, it is important to perform regular maintenance that includes cleaning filters, setting the correct temperature, and keeping the area around the outdoor unit clean
